description: Playground module that adds every supported geometry primitive (box, sphere, capsule, point, mesh PLY/STL, point cloud) to the Viam 3D scene viewer. Runtime DoCommands let you add/remove/update items, swap meshes, animate, snapshot the current scene back to a pasteable config, and toggle the renderer UUID strategy between stable+UPDATED (RDK fake pattern) and versioned (apriltag-tracker pattern). Default config emits one of every primitive in a row along X.

models.short_description: Monolith playground that renders every supported geometry primitive in the 3D scene viewer.
Minimal example: publishes a fixed box+sphere+capsule scene. Read first when learning the library.
Passive WSS that accepts Scene mutations pushed from a driver component.
Generic component that mutates a Scene at tick rate and pushes events to a paired visualizer.
